description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — UFO the Alien Life (UFO) reflects the enduring belief that UFOs have visited the USA and were documented by the US government under the name “Alien Life.” The crypto UFO empowers its holders, traders, and users with instant finality, ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capabilities, delivering an alien-inspired, high-performance digital asset worldwide.
name: UFO the Alien Life
